🏒 10,000 Shot Challenge

Track your summer hockey practice progress

How to use this tracker:
Fill in player names and log shots after each practice session. Add up the weekly totals to see who's leading the challenge. First to 10,000 wins!
Player Name Week 1 Week 2 Week 3 Week 4 Week 5 Week 6 Week 7 Week 8 TOTAL

Want a live leaderboard instead of printing?
Visit hockeyshotchallenge.com to track online and compete in real-time.
Tips:
  • Log shots after every practice session
  • All shot types count: wrist, snap, slap, backhand
  • Post this sheet somewhere visible to keep players motivated
  • Update weekly to keep the competition fun
  • First player to 10,000 shots wins!

🏒 Hockey Shot Challenge — Free 10,000 Shot Challenge Tracker

Print this tracker or use our online app at hockeyshotchallenge.com
